title: Tigers FC dig in their claws against limping Vista FC
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Western Tigers Football...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Western Tigers Football Club collected maximum points when they knocked the limping Vista FC 2-1 in a tough game on Sunday afternoon, 10 March at the Lawaaikamp Stadium. Anele Mlungelwa and Sakhe Pawuli netted the two goals for the Tigers, while Lutho Jonga scored the solitary goal for Vista FC.


> Both teams are fighting for the top eighth position in the Geolfa domestic league table.


The encounter got off to a good start with Vista getting the ball rolling. Western Tigers players launched an offensive move on the right side of the field, but a Vista defender blocked the ball.

The Tigers didn't waste time to launch a counter attack and Anele Mlungelwa scored their first goal after a powerful strike inside the box. Vista attacked on the left side of the field, but failed to score their equalising goal in the first half.

The second half started with both teams playing the ball on the ground looking for more chances. Vista received a penalty after a foul by the Western Tigers goalkeeper and Lutho Jonga scored the equalising goal to make it one all. Vista attacked on the right side of the field, but failed to score their second goal when their strike went wide.


> Things became more difficult for the Vista boys when Vuyisani Liwani was sent off with a red card after a dangerous tackle.


Lisakhanya Msitshana of Western Tigers missed the target when his shot went over the bar. Tigers moved forward using skilful touches on the ball leading to their winning goal when Sakhe Pawuli of Western Tigers scored, beating Vista FC goalkeeper Asemahle Viti.

Mzwamadoda Hlwempu (left) of Western Tigers chasing the ball against Vuyisani Liwani (right) of Vista FC. Photo: Zama Gagu

Geolfa weekend results:

Saturday 9 March

Domestic League

Paris United 4-0 Bangalore

Burning Fire 4-2 Young Pirates

Silver Stars 5-2 Heaven Stars

All Stars 0-5 Fast Eleven

Promotional League

United Spurs 4-0 Paris United

George Celtics 3-0 Young Masters

George Vultures 0-1 Future Stars

France 3-2 Vista

Burning Fire 1-2 Southern Academy

Sunday 10 March

Domestic League

Western Tigers 2-1 Vista

Abahlali 1-3 Raul Stars

Real Pacaltsdorp 2-0 Black Cats

Young Killers 4-1 Thembalethu Brothers

Promotional League

Celtics 3-1 Young Tigers

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
